# SpatialAudioDebug.DebugDrawPlayingState property

Draws a small wireframe sphere at the emitter origin that indicates playback state:

green = playing

red = stopped

Note: Always shown in the editor when the node is selected.

```csharp
public bool DebugDrawPlayingState { get; set; }
```
